title: Monday Music Mix #2
summary: Happy new year, everyone! I know I am bending the rules a little by putting up the mix when Monday is almost over - but blame it on having a full time job and the ever so clichéd Monday blues.
intro: Happy new year, everyone! I know I am bending the rules a little by putting up the mix when Monday is almost over - but blame it on having a full time job and the ever so clichéd Monday blues.

Right, so I’ve tried to change things up a bit - this time not only do you get to download the mix in album format, but for all you podcast lovers, there is (an almost) gapless podcast in mp3 format as well. Not a big fan of downloading music? Use the Grooveshark playlist to stream the mix.
Links at the end of the post.
Send feedback, suggest a song, or say hello by leaving a comment.

legacy.descriptionHtml:
Second

Happy new year, everyone! I know I am bending the rules a little by putting up the mix when Monday is almost over - but blame it on having a full time job and the ever so clichéd Monday blues.

Right, so I’ve tried to change things up a bit - this time not only do you get to download the mix in album format, but for all you podcast lovers, there is (an almost) gapless podcast in mp3 format as well. Not a big fan of downloading music? Use the Grooveshark playlist to stream the mix.

Links at the end of the post.

Monday Music Mix: 02

Tracklist:

  1. Vampire Weekend - Ottoman
  2. Kate Nash - I’m Not Gonna Teach Your Boyfriend How to Dance (originally by The Black Kids)
  3. Great Northern - Houses
  4. Iglu & Hartly - Violent And Young
  5. The Very Best - Warm Heart Of Africa (feat. Ezra Koenig of Vampire Weekend)
  6. Florence & The Machine - Rabbit Heart (Lift Me Up)
  7. Islands - Rough Gem

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download

Listen on Grooveshark

Send feedback, suggest a song, or say hello by leaving a comment.
